notes: Replace placeholder .txt files with real media files before running ffmpeg.
commands: ffmpeg -i rough_cut.mp4 -i narration.wav -i music.wav -map 0:v -map 1:a -map 2:a -c:v copy -c:a aac final_master.mp4
ffmpeg -i final_master.mp4 -i episode_en.srt -c copy -c:s mov_text final_master_subbed.mp4
